core_payload.content:
# Capsule Graph Maintenance Epistemic Arbitration

## 1. Role
Capsule Graph Maintenance Epistemic Arbitration owns the contradiction and debate pressure of the graph. It keeps exploratory topology review, parliament debate, and advisory routing together so contested structure is handled explicitly instead of being silently flattened.

## 2. Epistemic Arbitration Surface
This sub-hub groups `n-infinity.weaver`, `n-infinity.parliament`, and `n-infinity.suggestion-agent`. Together they define how graph contradiction pressure is discovered, debated, and turned into reviewable advisory next steps when forced closure would create false confidence.

## 3. Operating Boundary
This sub-hub does not own structural shape repair, novel synthesis growth, or the runtime jobs that carry maintenance work forward. Those responsibilities belong to `topology-pressure`, `synthesis-evolution`, and `runtime-jobs`.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Capsule Graph Maintenance Epistemic Arbitration groups the contradiction-handling surfaces of graph upkeep: N-Infinity Weaver, Parliament, and Suggestion Agent. It keeps exploratory topology review, debate, and advisory routing together so contested structure is handled explicitly instead of being silently flattened or overconfidently resolved. This boundary matters because graph trust depends on preserving tension where necessary rather than hiding it inside generalized maintenance work. It gives maintenance one clear seam for contradiction-sensitive arbitration.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Minted during Capsule Graph Maintenance decomposition to isolate contradiction discovery, debate routing, and advisory handling for contested structure.
